lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows significant wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is functional but will require routine maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, presenting exactly as it did the day it left the showroom. The exterior is impeccable, featuring a deep, mirror-like gloss on its original paint with no chips, scratches, or dings. Inside, the interior is pristine, with every surface well-preserved and all features in perfect working order. Mechanically, the car is flawless, providing a smooth and responsive driving experience that reflects its meticulous upkeep and low mileage. This is a rare find for any collector or enthusiast seeking a showroom-quality vehicle.

This vehicle is in museum-quality, mint condition. The exterior is absolutely perfect, with no blemishes, chips, or scratches on the original paint. The interior remains in brand-new condition, smelling fresh and showing zero wear on any surfaces. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and climate-controlled storage. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and performs exactly as it did on the showroom floor.
The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible paint fading and a few minor dents. The interior shows wear on the seats and carpeting. All mechanical systems

Get ready for a dependable daily driver that's priced to sell! This car is in fair condition, showing some character and signs of use over the years, but it's still got plenty of spirit. It’s a solid, functional choice for anyone who needs reliable transportation without the brand-new price tag. A great opportunity to own a quality vehicle that’s ready to hit the road!

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent care and reliable performance. This unit offers a balanced combination of sophisticated engineering and proven durability, ensuring a premium driving experience. Having undergone a thorough inspection, it stands as a testament to quality stewardship and remains in commendable condition for the discerning driver who values both prestige and long-term utility.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable set of wheels that has served me so well. It’s been kept in really nice shape, runs smoothly, and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner! It’s clean, well-loved, and honestly just a great find for anyone looking for a dependable ride. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

Used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean title. Normal interior wear.

This meticulously maintained executive sedan offers the perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine in its original metallic finish, with only minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the cabin remains a premium environment; the leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is in robust health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with full service records available for review. The engine delivers smooth, responsive power, the transmission shifts are seamless, and the suspension remains tight and quiet. With a fresh set of performance tires and recent brake service, this car is turn-key and ready for its next chapter.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic standards that align with our dealership's commitment to quality. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable and sophisticated driving experience, this vehicle stands as a testament to rigorous upkeep and enduring engineering.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This exceptionally well-maintained example offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it stands ready to deliver a superior driving experience. This is an ideal acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking both quality and value in a pre-owned motorcar.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out on a weekend road trip, this beauty is ready to go! It’s been well-maintained and still looks great inside and out. I'm sad to see it go, but I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come see it in person!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. Power is channeled through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and a reinforced rear subframe, addressing common platform weak points. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and rod bearing replacement, ensuring the high-revving internals are within factory tolerances. While the exterior shows minor patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical integrity is prioritized, featuring a refreshed cooling system and Bilstein dampers for optimized turn-in response and
Reliable daily driver. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is a remarkable example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use over the years. Inside, the cabin remains clean and inviting; the upholstery is free of tears, and all dashboard controls and infotainment features function exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and recent fluid changes. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. Whether you're navigating city streets or embarking on a long-distance road trip, this car offers a reliable and enjoyable driving experience. It comes with a complete service history and is ready for its next owner to take the wheel with confidence.

This exceptional vehicle serves as a testament to diligent maintenance and engineering integrity. Presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. Our comprehensive inspection process confirms that all essential systems operate at peak efficiency, ensuring this remains a premier selection for the sophisticated motorist who values both performance and long-term value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and exceptional value, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning motorist seeking quality and longevity.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next adventure? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly in great shape! It’s been well-cared for, runs like a charm, and is super comfortable for those long drives. You’re going to love how it handles! Grab it while you can!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically robust example featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six engine, equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a GKN variable M-differential lock. The chassis has been enhanced for longevity with a reinforced rear subframe carrier and updated trailing arm bushings to maintain precise toe geometry under load. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive valve clearance adjustment and rod bearing replacement, ensuring the internal rotating assembly remains within factory tolerances. Finished with staggered Style 67 forged wheels and a suspension tuned for neutral handling, this vehicle offers a visceral, linear power band and exceptional lateral grip for the serious driver.
Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Maintenance records available. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle is the perfect balance of performance and reliability. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with a consistent idle and responsive acceleration, reflecting a history of timely oil changes and routine servicing. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small scratch near the rear wheel well are present—typical for a car enjoyed on the road. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the leather seats are supple with only light bolster wear, and all electronics, including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control, function perfectly. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes feel firm and confident. This is a solid, honest car that has been cared for by an enthusiast and is ready for its next chapter. Full service records are available to verify its history.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior. Every system has undergone a rigorous assessment to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical soundness and aesthetic appeal. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a premium automotive experience characterized by longevity and consistent performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness. We invite you to experience the exceptional value and refined driving dynamics this vehicle provides.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it's totally ready for its next adventure with you! Everything runs smoothly, and it looks great both inside and out. If you're looking for a reliable car that still has tons of life left, this is definitely the one for you. Come take it for a spin!

Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Routine maintenance complete.

This meticulously maintained 2019 Executive Touring Sedan offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Finished in a deep Midnight Sapphire Metallic, the exterior retains a high-gloss luster with only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the Charcoal Nappa leather remains supple and smoke-free, complemented by polished walnut accents and an intuitive panoramic infotainment system. Mechanically, this vehicle stands tall; it has a complete service history, including a recent brake service and a fresh set of premium all-season tires. Every electronic feature, from the adaptive cruise control to the heated steering wheel, functions flawlessly. It provides a smooth, quiet ride that feels solid on the highway and nimble in the city. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that balances luxury and practicality perfectly.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated for the professional who demands mechanical reliability paired with aesthetic preservation. It features a documented service history and has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. A premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking both value and sophistication.
